positive: A minimalist, sophisticated depiction of a soaring mythical griffin, stylized with geometric lines and clean, sharp edges. The griffin is positioned centrally, mid-flight, with its silhouette sharply contrasted against a deep midnight blue gradient background. Its feathers and musculature are rendered in abstract, interlocking patterns of gold leaf and deep teal. Focus on strong compositional contrast and clean, scalable vector art aesthetics. Highly detailed, perfect for textile printing. Flat color blocking, modern graphic design, crisp white outline accents.
